scripts.coverage:backend: cd backend && ..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest app/tests --cov=app --cov-config=.coveragerc --cov-fail-under=60 --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=html:htmlcov --cov-report=json:coverage.json --cov-report=xml:coverage.xml && cd .. && node scripts/render-backend-coverage-report.mjs --backend backend/coverage.json --output backend/coverage
